• ODM / ORM
    • Sequelizestars26.9k - Multi-dialect ORM. Supports PostgreSQL, SQLite, MySQL, and more.

    • MikroORMstars5.2k - TypeScript ORM based on Data Mapper, Unit of Work and Identity Map patterns. Supports MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL and SQLite.
    • Prismastars26.2k - Modern database access (ORM alternative). Auto-generated and type-safe query builder in TypeScript. Supports PostgreSQL, MySQL & SQLite.
